images.prompt: A raw, ultra-realistic 8k photograph of a stunningly beautiful, young Japanese female model with a top-tier gravure idol aesthetic, standing in a steamy bathroom filled with rising water vapor. She is wearing a trendy, sexy denim dungaree outfit with a single strap provocatively undone, revealing a delicate lace camisole underneath that accentuates her ample chest and slim waist. The fabric texture of the denim contrasts sharply with the softness of her flawless skin, visible pores, and faint vellus hair. She gazes directly into the lens with a seductive smile, her large expressive eyes locking eyes with the viewer, while the streetlight amber glow filters through the frosted window, casting a warm, professional illumination that highlights her curves without heavy shadows. The background is a minimalist, clean aesthetic of blurred white tiles and condensation, creating a high contrast and sharp look. Shot on Sony A7R IV, 85mm f/1.4 GM lens, depth of field, ray tracing, global illumination.8k photo, Large breasts
